name: obsidian-offline-agent-review
description: Architecture blueprint and production review for an offline Obsidian Mobile AI agent.

scripts.healthcheck: node -e "fetch('http://127.0.0.1:' + (process.env.PORT || 3000) + '/health').then(r => { if (!r.ok) process.exit(1); return r.json(); }).then(j => { if (j.status !== 'ok') process.exit(1); })"
